instructions.instruction: Use this skill before modifying ANY schema, query, or migration.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill before modifying ANY schema, query, or migration.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger ecto-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Never combine schema changes and data backfill** in the same migration
instructions.original_snippets: **Never combine schema changes and data backfill** in the same migration
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger ecto-essentials.

instructions.instruction: Define schemas with proper types and associations. The example below shows a child schema with `belongs_to`; a parent schema uses `has_many` in the same pattern (see `Folder` in the migration section for reference).
instructions.original_snippets: Define schemas with proper types and associations. The example below shows a child schema with `belongs_to`; a parent schema uses `has_many` in the same pattern (see `Folder` in the migration section for reference).
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger ecto-essentials.

instructions.instruction: Write clear, reversible migrations. After writing a migration, always validate it with the steps below.
instructions.original_snippets: Write clear, reversible migrations. After writing a migration, always validate it with the steps below.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger ecto-essentials.

instructions.instruction: Run `mix ecto.migrate` — confirm it applies without errors
instructions.original_snippets: Run `mix ecto.migrate` — confirm it applies without errors
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger ecto-essentials.

instructions.instruction: Run `mix ecto.rollback` — confirm it reverses cleanly
instructions.original_snippets: Run `mix ecto.rollback` — confirm it reverses cleanly
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger ecto-essentials.

instructions.instruction: Run `mix ecto.migrate` again — confirm re-applying succeeds
instructions.original_snippets: Run `mix ecto.migrate` again — confirm re-applying succeeds
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger ecto-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Never call Repo from the web layer** (LiveViews, controllers) — all database operations belong in context modules.
instructions.original_snippets: **Never call Repo from the web layer** (LiveViews, controllers) — all database operations belong in context modules.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger ecto-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Do not invoke this skill** for simple read-only schema inspection or introspection (use `mix ecto.schema` directly instead)
instructions.original_snippets: **Do not invoke this skill** for simple read-only schema inspection or introspection (use `mix ecto.schema` directly instead)
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger ecto-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Do not use this skill** for raw SQL queries that bypass Ecto entirely — write raw SQL in a dedicated repo method, not inline in contexts
instructions.original_snippets: **Do not use this skill** for raw SQL queries that bypass Ecto entirely — write raw SQL in a dedicated repo method, not inline in contexts
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger ecto-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Do not invoke this skill** for multi-table complex transactions — use `ecto-changeset-patterns` for `Ecto.Multi` and nested association patterns
instructions.original_snippets: **Do not invoke this skill** for multi-table complex transactions — use `ecto-changeset-patterns` for `Ecto.Multi` and nested association patterns
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger ecto-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Do not use this skill** for database migration planning — use `ecto-migration` persona instead for migration orchestration
instructions.original_snippets: **Do not use this skill** for database migration planning — use `ecto-migration` persona instead for migration orchestration
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger ecto-essentials.
